subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the Sovereign of the Kingdom unto them that have believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Knowing. O My loved ones in Alif and Rá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الملکوت للذین آمنوا بالله الفرد الخبیر یا اولیائی فی الالف و الراء
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
